title: Support assignment patterns as comparison operands

features.name: assignment pattern in equality comparison
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern used as an operand in an equality comparison (EQ or NEQ) with an unpacked array or queue

features.name: assignment pattern struct equality comparison
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern used as an operand in an equality comparison with a struct type
features.snippet: typedef struct { int x; int y; } my_struct_t; my_struct_t s; if (s == '{x: 1, y: 2}) $display("match");
